cc:Work.dc:title: Box - BoxWithDrawer
cc:Work.dc:description:
Two-piece outer box with a separate-height sliding drawer.
A two-piece box where the inner volume can be filled with a dedicated drawer. Use *drawer_h* to control drawer height independently from *h* / *hi*.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes BoxWithDrawer Command line short: boxes BoxWithDrawer
